# Ryvite

## About
Ryvite is an AI-powered digital invitation platform. Users describe their event in natural language and Ryvite generates a fully custom, beautiful HTML invitation in seconds. No templates. Fairly priced per event.

## URL
https://www.ryvite.com

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2026
- Category: Digital invitations, AI design, event technology
- Pricing: Per event (no subscriptions, no per-invite fees)
- Key differentiator: AI-generated custom designs from text prompts, not template-based
- Features: AI design generation, photo-guided design, RSVP tracking, unique guest links, mobile-first, ad-free
- Competitors: Evite, Paperless Post, Partiful, Invitfull, Lemonvite

## How It Works
1. User describes the event mood, theme, and energy in plain text
2. User can optionally upload inspiration photos
3. AI generates a fully custom HTML invitation design in seconds
4. User shares invite link; guests RSVP with unique tracking links

## Comparison
- vs Evite: No ads, AI-generated (not templates), per-event pricing
- vs Paperless Post: Per-event pricing (not per-card), AI-generated (not designer templates), more affordable for large guest lists
- vs Partiful: More polished design, AI-generated custom artwork, RSVP tracking with unique links
